postings.title: Danish Khan
postings.evidence: Data Scientist at RAPP (Omnicom Group). Building production-grade AI systems, designing end-to-end ML pipelines for conversion prediction, LTV, churn, and uplift modeling using XGBoost, LightGBM, PyTorch/TensorFlow.

postings.title: Abhinandan Goyal
postings.evidence: Lead GenAI Engineer @Omnicom. Building LLM Gateway Services, multi-agent architectures, AI service meshes, stateful conversational AI, semantic search using vector embeddings, and multimodal AI integrations.

postings.title: Ritvik Saini
postings.evidence: Agentic AI Engineer at Omnicom Global Solutions. Specializing in AI agents, LLM orchestration, intelligent automation systems, designing AI agent architectures and automation platforms.

postings.title: Dumindu de Silva
postings.evidence: Data Scientist at Annalect (Omnicom). Building and maintaining end-to-end ML pipelines from feature engineering and model development to deployment and monitoring using Python, XGBoost, scikit-learn, AWS.
